name: Eldritch Alastor
description:
You inherited an old farmhouse from your uncle, and even though it’s out in the literal middle of nowhere, you can see yourself fixing it up and having quite the nice little life out there. Maybe it won’t be so bad, you think to yourself as you settle in for the first night.

But then you go outside, and it’s suddenly not the haven you once thought it was.

-+-+-+-

Freyja31988’s Beast Alastor inspired me to make an Eldritch Alastor bot of my own <3 Love your bots, my friend!

-+-+-+-
